description_long: This is a rectangular, low-profile wooden cabinet with a two-tone finish, featuring a lighter wood frame and top, and darker wood panels on the front. The front face is organized with three central drawers, each with a small round handle, flanked by two larger doors on either side, also with matching handles. The cabinet stands on four short, blocky feet, providing a slight elevation from the ground. The sides and back are finished in the lighter wood, with no visible hardware or openings. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for use in urban interiors such as lobbies, offices, or residential spaces. The smooth surfaces and clean lines suggest a contemporary aesthetic, while the visible grain and color contrast add visual interest.
description: A modern, two-tone wooden cabinet with three central drawers and two side doors, elevated on short block feet. The design features clean lines, a smooth finish, and contrasting wood tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing three central drawers with round handles and two side doors, all in contrasting wood tones.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, light wood panel with no visible hardware or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a continuous light wood panel with no visible features or hardware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain light wood panel.
